Title: EcoTech UAE – Municipal Partnerships
Description: Delivered municipality-approved food waste and grease-trap management solutions across Ajman, enabling full compliance for over 400 F&B establishments.  Key Achievements:  	•	Achieved 100% approval rate with Ajman Municipality.  	•	Reduced operational downtime through process digitalization (Jobber + Google Sheets integration).  	•	Increased waste collection efficiency by 35% through optimized routing and reporting.  Impact: Strengthened EcoTech’s municipal partnerships and set a benchmark for environmental compliance in the Emirate.

Title: EcoTech AI Integration – Smart Environmental Operations
Description: Designed and implemented AI-assisted operational tools to optimize field scheduling, client communication, and waste collection efficiency across EcoTech UAE’s service network.  Key Components:  • Integrated Jobber API + Google Sheets AI scripting for real-time task allocation.  • Developed predictive analytics dashboards using Python and OpenAI API to forecast service demand and optimize routes.  • Implemented Neural Cockpit V3, an AI-based internal dashboard connecting job data, invoices, and municipal compliance reports.  Impact:  • Reduced operational downtime by 25%. • Improved reporting accuracy and traceability for municipal audits. • Demonstrated practical use of AI and automation in environmental management.  Tech Stack: Python | OpenAI API | Google App Script | Notion AI | Jobber API | Data Studio

Title: Grease traps supply & installation
Description: Approved by Ajman  Municipalities, this project involves the supply, installation, and maintenance of certified oil and grease traps for commercial and residential establishments. Implemented under EcoTech UAE’s sustainability framework, it supports municipal compliance, wastewater protection, and circular waste management aligned with the UAE Circular Economy Strategy.
